name: app.zelta/mcp
title: Zelta
description: Public MCP server for Zelta — a multi-rail payments and wallet platform. Exposes 12 tools across accounts, payments, transactions, exchange, on/offramp, and SMS, gated by OAuth 2.1 with per-token spending limits.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_SERVER_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the remote MCP endpoint. Defaults to https://mcp.zelta.app/mcp.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_SERVER
environmentVariables.description: Override the OAuth authorization server. Defaults to https://zelta.app.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_OAUTH_NO_BROWSER
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to print the auth URL instead of opening a browser (useful in headless environments).

environmentVariables.name: FINAEGIS_MCP_TOKEN_STORE
environmentVariables.description: Token storage backend: 'file' (default, ~/.config/finaegis-mcp/tokens.json) or 'keychain' (requires keytar installed separately).
